title: Split core and plan Python boundary
summary: Move repo-local planning runtime under plan/python/src/watchtower_plan/, keep reusable core fail-closed, and guard against .wt or repo_ops regression.
scope_items: Define and enforce the approved plan-owned Python boundary under plan/python/**.
Keep reusable core, CLI, closeout, and validation imports aligned with the new boundary.
Update docs, tests, validation, and residue guards so reusable core stays pack-agnostic while repo-local consumers reach watchtower_plan through explicit repo-local bootstrap.
done_when_items: watchtower_core.plan_runtime no longer owns active plan-domain runtime in the clean endstate.
Plan-domain Python lives behind an approved boundary under plan/** and reusable core stays pack-agnostic.
Validation and targeted regression suites pass after the boundary cutover.
